title: Admin Console
sectionMachineIdentityServiceAccountsDes: Manage service accounts and the JIT access requests they raise.
sectionMachineIdentityMcpClientsDesc: Register clients for AI agents to connect via the MCP gateway.
sectionMachineIdentityOperatorTokensDesc: Issue and manage per-operator bearer tokens for admin/maintenance routes.
sectionPolicyAuthenticationDesc: Configure password, session, passkey, and lockout authentication policies.
sectionPolicyMachineIdentityDesc: Configure machine-identity token and delegation session policies.
sectionPolicyRetentionDesc: Configure retention policies for data archival and deletion.
sectionPolicyAccessRestrictionDesc: Restrict tenant access by IP or network path.
sectionIntegrationProvisioningDesc: Connect with external IdPs via SCIM and directory sync.
sectionIntegrationWebhooksDesc: Send tenant-wide events to external systems via webhooks.
sectionIntegrationAuditDeliveryDesc: Forward audit logs to external systems such as SIEMs.
sectionAuditLogsDesc: Review organization activity and security events.
teamSectionGeneralDesc: Manage team name, description, and basic settings.
teamSectionWebhooksDesc: Send team-scoped events to external systems via webhooks.
teamSectionAuditLogsDesc: Review team activity and security events.
